name: Tsukiji Uoichiba Company, Limited
summary: Tsukiji Uoichiba Company, Limited engages in the consignment or purchase and sale of marine products in Japan. The company sells fresh fish, live fish, and specialty fish, as well as various kinds of frozen fish along with tuna, fish roe products, salmon, and trout. It also engages in the processing production, fishing, and importing of marine products; ice making, refrigerating, freezing, and sale of its products; real estate business; and wholesale of fresh processed marine products, as well as operates and manages cold storage warehouses. The company exports its products to Asia, North America, and internationally. Tsukiji Uoichiba Company, Limited was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
